subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of God's love! Rejoice thou in the light of guidance, the supreme direction, and the most excellent path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المشتعل بنار محبه الله ابشر بنور الهدی و الهدایه الکبری و الطریقه المثلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
